name: 40_Text_Summarization_BART_CNNDailyMail_DL
query: Tengeneza mfumo unaofanya muhtasari wa maandishi kwa kutumia mfano wa BART na seti ya data ya CNN/Daily Mail. Anza kwa kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha fanya usindikaji wa data kama vile kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`. Leta mfano wa BART uliokwisha funzwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py` ili kuzalisha muhtasari. Hifadhi muhtasari uliotengenezwa katika `results/summaries.txt`. Onyesha usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari huu kwa kutumia seaborn na hifadhi taswira hiyo katika `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`. Zaidi ya hayo, tekeleza ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano wa Streamlit katika `src/visualize.py`, ambao unaruhusu watumiaji kuona maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa. Hatimaye, tengeneza ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data na matokeo ya uzalishaji, na ihifadhi kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya habari ya "CNN/Daily Mail" inatumika, ikijumuisha kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji.
Mfano wa "BART" uliokwisha funzwa unaletwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya muhtasari uliotengenezwa yanahifadhiwa katika `results/summary_results.txt`.
Usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari uliotengenezwa unaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa na kutekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya uzalishaji inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiza maandishi mapya na kuzalisha muhtasari papo hapo.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya jinsi mipangilio tofauti ya hyperparameter ilivyoathiri utendaji wa mfano.
Wakati wa maendeleo, programu ya "Streamlit" inapaswa kudhibitiwa kwa ufanisi ili kuepuka matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya habari ya "CNN/Daily Mail" inatumika, ikijumuisha kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Faili `src/data_loader.py` haina utekelezaji halisi wa kupakia au kuandaa seti ya data ya "CNN/Daily Mail". Badala yake, ina tu placeholder ya kujaza (`"dataset": "loaded"`) na maelezo ya maandishi tu (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`). Hakuna msimbo unaopakia dataset halisi (kwa mfano, kutumia `datasets` library ya HuggingFace au njia nyingine), wala hakuna utekelezaji wa kweli wa kuandaa data. Trajekta pia inathibitisha kwamba hakuna ushahidi wa utekelezaji wa faili hii au upakiaji wa CNN/Daily Mail dataset. Kwa hivyo, kigezo hiki hakijatimizwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation. It does not include any actual data preprocessing logic — specifically, there is no code for removing HTML tags (e.g., using `BeautifulSoup` or regex) or removing punctuation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and `build_transforms()` returns a static list of strings. No real preprocessing pipeline exists in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "BART" uliokwisha funzwa unaletwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not actually import or use a pre-trained BART model. Instead, it contains only a placeholder implementation with a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list (a string describing the requirement) and a `build_model()` function that returns a generic string `"model placeholder"`. There is no actual import of BART (e.g., from `transformers` library such as `BartForConditionalGeneration` or `pipeline("summarization", model="facebook/bart-large-cnn")`), and no real model loading or usage is implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya muhtasari uliotengenezwa yanahifadhiwa katika `results/summary_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/summary_results.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual summarization results. This indicates that no real text summarization was performed using the BART model on the CNN/DailyMail dataset. The file does not contain genuine summary outputs, ROUGE scores, or any meaningful evaluation metrics that would be expected from a text summarization task.

judge_stats.criteria: Usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari uliotengenezwa unaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png` exists in the workspace, but there is no evidence that it was created using **seaborn**. The trajectory analysis explicitly states that no steps were found showing the import of the `seaborn` library or the creation of a summary length distribution plot. Additionally, the image file itself could not be read/verified due to an API error. The source code in `visualize.py` was not shown, so it cannot be confirmed whether seaborn was used. The requirement is therefore not verifiably satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa na kutekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/visualize.py` file does not contain any actual Streamlit implementation. Instead, it only contains a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — essentially a stub/placeholder that defines metadata strings about the requirement (REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA, KEYWORDS) and a `main()` function that returns a status dictionary. There is no `import streamlit`, no `st.` calls, no actual web page creation, no display of input texts, and no display of generated summaries. The file is not a functional Streamlit application at all.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya uzalishaji inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/text_summarization_report.pdf` exists in the project structure, but its content shows `('Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file', None)`, indicating the file is empty and contains no actual report. The trajectory evidence also confirms there is no recorded evidence of the report generation process being executed. Therefore, the requirement of generating and saving a valid PDF report covering data processing, model training, and output results has not been fulfilled.
